Class PrizeDAO

java.lang.Object
dao.PrizeDAO
public class PrizeDAO extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) for the Prize table. Handles all database operations related to prizes — create, read, update, and delete.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PrizeDAO()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addPrize(Prize p)
    Inserts a new prize into the database.
    void
    deletePrize(int prizeId)
    Deletes a prize from the database by its ID.
    List<Prize>
    getAllPrizes()
    Retrieves all prizes from the database.
    void
    updatePrize(Prize p)
    Updates an existing prize's details in the database.

  • Constructor Details

    • PrizeDAO

      public PrizeDAO()

  • Method Details

    • addPrize

      public void addPrize(Prize p)
      Inserts a new prize into the database. The prize_id is auto-generated by the database.
      Parameters:
      p - The Prize object containing the details to insert.

    • getAllPrizes

      public List<Prize> getAllPrizes()
      Retrieves all prizes from the database.
      Returns:
      A list of all Prize objects, or an empty list if none exist.

    • updatePrize

      public void updatePrize(Prize p)
      Updates an existing prize's details in the database. Matches the record using prize_id.
      Parameters:
      p - The Prize object with updated values.

    • deletePrize

      public void deletePrize(int prizeId)
      Deletes a prize from the database by its ID.
      Parameters:
      prizeId - The prize_id of the prize to remove.
